creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 234157
textproc/htmldoc: update to 1.9.16

A number of bug fixes releases.

While we are at it, take over maintainership: the current maintainer has previously either not responded to my PRs or responded long after the maintainer timeout has run it.  It seems like he is no longer interested in actively contributing to the port and I haven't seen any contributions at all by him in the last few years.

I had also requested maintainership the last time I submitted an update, but the maintainer never responded to my question if he would be willing to pass on the port.

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
Please MFH these bug fix releases.
